name: Bouillabaisse
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except seafood in a crockpot.
2. Cover and cook on High for 2 to 4 hours.
3. Add the mixed fish (halibut), lobster/tails (optional), crabmeat (optional), and shrimp, shelled and deveined, as well as clams, mussels, or scallops.
4. Cover and cook on High for 1 to 3 more hours.
5. Serve in heated large bowls garnished with fresh parsley and crusty bread on the side.
